analysis.object: T576: Dominoes Falling Depth Traversal depth analysis

discrete_domino.reason: Individual domino is EML-0: binary state, no internal dynamics

chain_reaction.description: Chain reaction: exponential energy transfer along line; EML-1
chain_reaction.reason: Domino cascade is EML-1: each knock triggers next with ~2x energy transfer

wave_propagation.description: Propagating knock wave: characteristic speed and oscillatory pattern; EML-3
wave_propagation.reason: Wave front is EML-3: oscillatory knock pattern at well-defined propagation speed

skips_two.description: Domino chain traverses 0->1->3 skipping EML-2; simplest natural skip-two system
skips_two.reason: Skip-two theorem: domino chain is natural EML-0->EML-1->EML-3 without EML-2 intermediate
